_doc: FR-2.3 [docs/specs/pdp-full-content/2026-07-16_v1] — explicit acquisition scope. Every active feed the account can download must be either ingested or excluded HERE with a reason; the coverage watchdog (FR-2.2) alerts on any feed in neither state. Change deliberately.

exclusions.reason: non-German feed from a non-DE-market advertiser — same-market (Primary Region = DE) feeds are consumable in any language since the 2026-07 quick win; other markets await multi-market activation
non-EUR pricing — currency policy pending (Renogy-GB GBP, MISSHA USD fail the EUR gate)
